name: Fnllyn Bara Lawr Ae Oen Cymreig Alewn Crwstyn
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin and bone the loin of lamb.
2. Finely chop the onions and sweat in 2 oz. drippings until translucent, about 3 minutes.
3. Add finely chopped mushrooms and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
4. Stir in breadcrumbs, laverbread, and chopped parsley. Mix with a little milk to form a smooth consistency, then season with salt and pepper.
5. Stuff the loin cavity with the mixture, tie securely, and seal with melted drippings.
6. Roast in a preheated oven at 430°F (220°C) for 30 minutes.
7. Cool and drain the lamb roast.
8. Roll out the shortcrust pastry into a rectangle about 5/16 inch thick.
9. Spread the remaining stuffing mixture over the pastry, leaving a 2-inch margin all around.
10. Place the cooled lamb roast in the center of the pastry, brushing the edge with egg wash.
11. Envelop the meat completely in the pastry and seal the edges.
12. Turn the parcel over so that the folds rest underneath on a greased baking sheet.
13. Brush the parcel with egg wash and decorate as desired.
14. Bake at 425°F (220°C) for an additional 30 minutes.
15. Garnish with chopped parsley and sliced tomatoes.
16. Serve with roasted leeks, baked potatoes, and brown sauce.
